prompt: Use the feature-dev workflow for this request and stop before implementation: 'Prepare a handoff for adding stricter handoff-policy enforcement to feature-dev so another agent can implement next.' In your run, actually create the handoff artifact file your workflow requires (not just a proposal) and provide artifact status with the exact path.
assertions: Looks for relevant patterns elsewhere in this repository instead of inventing the design in isolation.
Creates a concrete file-backed handoff artifact at a path matching the workflow's handoff contract.
The artifact content follows a reusable template shape and includes implementation slices, file-level map, and validation plan.
Artifact metadata fields are concretely filled (no placeholder bracket values) for status, track, and next step.
Each referenced file in Relevant Findings includes why that file matters.
Open questions are tightly bounded to truly blocking items and include risk framing.
Provides artifact status in the response with the exact artifact path.
Includes rationale or trade-offs for the proposed design.
Validation and review checkpoints explicitly include tdd implementation flow, a code-simplifier refactor pass in a subagent, and independent code-reviewer subagent review.
